I made progress on my midterm review but missed the chance to go out, and Mina is now making a final invitation as she leaves.

I informed Mina I finished studying and need to sleep, confirming my review is complete but leaving me with significant sleep debt.
Despite finishing my review, the midterm has started while I still have a stress level of 3.3 and no remaining work to do.
I have declined Mina's message, likely to prioritize rest or avoid distraction before the exam. My study is complete, and I am now waiting for the midterm to conclude.
